commit.message:
Add SSD1325 and SH1107 advanced emulator tests (338 tests)

SSD1325 tests (ssd1325_advanced_tests.cpp):
- copyBlock command (0x23): forward copy, backward copy, overlapping regions
- Horizontal addressing mode (s_verticalMode=0): fillRect, area fill
- COM split and remap modes: comSplit match/mismatch, right-to-left,
  bottom-to-top, nibble remap flag
- Additional commands: contrast, display on/off, multiplex ratio,
  bulk config commands, unknown command fallthrough
- SSD1327 COM split scenarios: default, disabled (remap), enabled (no remap)

SH1107 tests (sh1107_advanced_tests.cpp):
- Column addressing mode (0x21): sets pageAddressingMode=0
- Display all-white mode (0xA5): displayMode |= 2
- Display offset (0xD3), start line (0xDC), COM scan direction (0xC0/0xC8)
- flipHorizontal, contrast, display on/off, misc config commands
- Raw page/column selection via 0xBn/0x0n/0x1n commands

Coverage: sdl_ssd1325.c 68.7% -> 93.9%, sdl_sh1107.c 84.7% -> 97.8%.
Overall: 84.8% -> 86.4% lines, 89.7% -> 90.4% functions.

commit.message:
Add rotation and TFT variant tests, fix IL9163 emulator state leak

Add 36 new tests covering IL9163/ILI9341/SSD1331 rotation modes, ST7735
80x160 and 128x160 variants, and ST7789 135x240 variant in
rotation_tests.cpp.

Fix IL9163 emulator reset function to clear all state (colConnection,
rowConnection, TOTAL_COLUMNS, TOTAL_ROWS, verticalMode, column/page
state) preventing cross-test contamination when different TFT display
types share the same emulator code.

Coverage: sdl_il9163.c 62.8% -> 96.8%, sdl_ili9341.c 78.4% -> 96.4%.
Overall: 83.0% -> 84.8% lines (301 tests, 0 valgrind errors).

commit.message:
Fix SDL emulator state leaks between tests

- Add reset() functions to ILI9341, SSD1325, SSD1351, PCD8544 emulators
  to clear stale 'detected' flags between test runs
- Call unregister_oleds() at start of sdl_core_init() to prevent
  p_oled_db array from growing on repeated init calls
- Move ILI9341 s_firstStart from function-local to file-scope static
  so reset() can reach it
- Zero g_pixels buffer after malloc in sdl_graphics_set_oled_params()
  to prevent uninitialized memory reads
- Fix SH1107 emulator: multiplexRatio check >= to > (off-by-one
  disabled last display row)

Root cause: stale 'detected=1' flags in emulators without reset()
caused wrong display driver to win auto-detection when tests ran
in sequence, leading to buffer overflows (320x240 ILI9341 params
applied to 128x128 IL9163 buffer).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Nx Release workflow documentation page (#1486)

This pull request updates the documentation to clarify and expand the
release automation options for monorepos, specifically by distinguishing
between Changesets and Nx-based release workflows. It introduces a new,
comprehensive guide for automating versioning and publishing with Nx,
and updates existing docs to direct Nx users to the appropriate
resource.

Resolves: CES-1451
depends-on: #1510

---------

feat: add drill phase to lesson runner

Introduce a three-phase lesson architecture in LessonRunner:

Phase 1 (Intro) → Phase 2 (Drill) → Phase 3 (Practice)

The drill phase sits between intro cards and practice exercises,
giving learners reinforcement at the word level before sentence-level
tasks. Words from Phase 1 are queued for multiple-choice drill;
a word is mastered after 3 consecutive correct answers and leaves
the queue. Incorrect answers reset the consecutive count and cycle
the word to the back.

Key additions:
- DrillExercise component (multiple-choice, 4 options, skip support)
- Queue-based mastery algorithm (3 consecutive correct = mastered)
- Segmented progress bar reflecting all three phases independently
- Phase navigation tabs (Intro / Drill / Practice)
- Smart resume logic — reloading lands in the correct phase
- useMemo to split exercises by phase type

mono_region_equals, and rgb8_region_equals helper functions.

Note: Monochrome tests avoid putPixel-based operations (drawLine,
drawCircle) due to SSD1306 page-byte architecture limitations where
putPixel replaces entire 8-pixel column pages without read-modify-write.

commit.message:
Fix drawHLine off-by-one and drawLine pixel ordering bugs

drawHLine for 4-bit, 8-bit, and 16-bit modes used 'while (x1 < x2)'
which excluded the last pixel. Changed to 'x1 <= x2' to match the
correct 1-bit implementation. The 1-bit drawHLine already used
'for (x = x1; x <= x2; x++)' (inclusive end).

drawLine (Bresenham) called putPixel AFTER the error accumulation
and coordinate adjustment, causing the first pixel to be shifted.
For example, drawLine(0,0,63,63) would start at (0,1) instead of
(0,0). Moved putPixel before the error/step logic in both branches.

commit.message:
Add KQL engine, query telemetry, DML commands, vector search, and Explorer enhancements

New features:
- KQL query engine with operators (where, project, extend, summarize, sort, top, take, distinct, count)
- Query telemetry store and activity tracking interfaces and storage implementations
- DML command service for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE operations
- Vector embedding policy and vector index models
- KQL query controller and query telemetry controller in Host

Explorer (React):
- Container settings panel
- Import documents dialog
- KQL query editor component
- Query telemetry dashboard

Query engine improvements:
- Additional system functions and scalar subquery support
- Enhanced query explain service

Tests:
- KQL query executor tests
- DML command service, consistency middleware, indexing directive tests
- System function, scalar subquery, trigger execution, UDF query tests
- Vector search, unique key, query telemetry, TTL cleanup tests
